headline: Moderate Winds and Waves Impact Eastern Caribbean Ports
paragraph: Today, Turks & Caicos in the Eastern Caribbean will experience the most significant conditions with winds reaching 20 knots and wave heights up to 6.1 feet from the NNE. Rain chances are notable at 63 percent, while Barbados in the Lesser Antilles also sees sustained winds near 20 knots, indicating moderate weather impacts across key cruise regions.
